specific_question: How many compliance checkpoints did the cybersecurity specialist at MediConn define for software developers connecting to MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform in September, 2025?
answer: Between September 1 and September 30, 2025, the cybersecurity specialist defined 4 aligned compliance checkpoints to verify cybersecurity standards before software developers could access MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
